name: Hall Chadwick Acquisition Corp
business: Hall Chadwick Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or other similar business combination. The company has not yet commenced operations and has generated no operating revenues. It intends to identify a target business in the technology, critical minerals, and energy sectors.

exposures.sentence: We currently intend to concentrate our efforts on identifying companies in the technology, critical minerals and energy sectors and adjacent sectors that power transformation and innovation.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We have 24 months from the closing of the initial public offering to consummate our initial business combination.
